reviews.review_title: And another escape room, which I love
reviews.review_description: Just finished the demo and I loved it. You have to use your brains to solve the puzzles. Also some strategic moves with the cards. Very nice.
The idea of cards to attack, etc is very boring for me. I appreciate the trial, but card games like these were not done when I was little and I don't connect as an elderly adult.

reviews.review_title: Looks like someone made this just for me
reviews.review_description: Love it. Great idea. Great graphics and puzzles. Feels very indie in all the right ways  looking forward to the full game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing!  The full game is coming out in a few days!  :D

reviews.review_description:
Just finished the demo, 
Interesting storyline filled with card focused battle and intriguing mini puzzles - can’t wait till the full version comes out!

My only complaint is that the demo is too short. The hint  system is there if you want it, but the game lets you figure it out if you are stubborn like me. Wishlisted and this will be a preorder buy for me.

developer_response.body: Hi Phaenomenal!  Thanks for your comments!  Glad you enjoyed the demo!

reviews.review_description: I really like the game but I’m at the point in the demo where you have play the instrument re Gods and it won’t let me.  Nothing I do plays the strings.  I would buy the game if this problem was fixed.

developer_response.body: Hi HezCar!  We're happy to help!  I'm wondering if you were able to play the instrument at other times during the game.  If so, you might try restarting the game, and loading your latest save game.  Or, if you'd like, you can ping us in our discord server: https://discord.gg/68nFgy6naq

reviews.review_description: Great game, challenging puzzles and the hint system usually doesn’t give too much away. Really sharp graphics too. Reminded me of Shadowgate, one of my favorite VR titles. Hope this gets a full release!
Good difficulty for the riddles and I like the combat system with the magic cards. Hoping to see a full game soon.

Just finished the demo and I can’t wait for more! This is beautifully done. Puzzles are not too difficult, but they make you think. Graphics and settings are beautiful. Excellent job devs.  Thank you!

developer_response.body: Hi!  Thanks for playing!  The full version isn't released yet, but you can wishlist it here: https://bit.ly/EfHW_Quest

reviews.review_description: Aewsome demo. Awaiting the game release. Hope its still on schedule for summer 2025.

developer_response.body: Hi Nanika69!  We've finally announced our release date!  November 10, 2025!  We are excited to show the full game!

reviews.review_description:
Excellent!

Would purchase a full release with this type of quality!

Any type of update would be great?

I love puzzle games and this one is unique in that it implements card magic throughout wish just adds an extra layer of intrigue. The magic wand with the elemental gems is a really cool tool because it gets revisited and really does feel magical  Beautiful demo and fun puzzles. I hope they finish it!
Loved the demo. Looking forward to the full release. Please keep up the good work.
Good game but doesn’t save even though it says does prepare to finish the game once you start.
I got this to try for free. It shows as “Purchases” but I can’t see it to load in my library.

developer_response.body: Hi Sharm2!  Thanks for attempting to download our game!  If you'd like to try again, feel free to pop into our discord server and ask for help!  We'd love for you to play the game!

reviews.review_description: This is such a fun puzzle adventure game. You have to solve your way through it and you’re forced to think! So much fun!
